creator: johntdarrah@gmail.com
text:
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/bsdinstall/#bsdinstall-pre

"Once it has been determined that the system meets the minimum hardware requirements for installing FreeBSD, the installation file should be downloaded and the installation media prepared."

to...

"Once it has been determined that the system meets the minimum hardware requirements for installing FreeBSD, the installation file should be downloaded and the installation media prepared. An alternative is to use virtualization (Virtualization) which allows multiple operating systems to run at the same time without modifying any disk partitions."

What do we think?
